title: Du darfst nicht länger schweigen
actors: Heidemarie Hatheyer, Wilhelm Borchert, Werner Hinz
plot: A Nordic fishermen's village surrounded by the raging sea. This is were fisherman Haldor (Wilhelm Borchert) is living. His marriage with the proud Salvör (Heidemarie Hatheyer) is going to be impend. While on the sea in a storm, he...
